path: PNGS/Verse revealed for Ali Hamza and Ubaidah.png
text: It was narrated that Qais bin ‘Ubaid said: “I heard Abu Dharr swearing that these verses were revealed concerning those six people on the Day of [Bade: ‘These two ‘opponents (believers and disbelievers) dispute with each other about their Lord"[22:19] to the words “Verly, Alleh does what he ‘wills"[22:14] (that is) Hamzah bin *Abdul-Muttalib, A bin Abi Talib, “Ubaidah bin Al-Harith, “Utbah bin Rabi'ah, Shaibah bin Rabi'ah and Al-Walid bin ‘Utbah. They argued with one another on the Day of Badr -~ Grade: Sahih (Darussalam) PP [ —
